evidence_snippet: Maester Smike served Lord Marq Farman of Fair Isle, as well as his eldest son, Ser Franklyn Farman
Maester Smike served Lord Marq Farman of Fair Isle, as well as his eldest son, Ser Franklyn Farman, who succeeded his father as lord in 50 AC.

reason: generic-role-label-not-a-node; 'lord' is a role reference, not a title node

evidence_snippet: Maester Smike served Lord Marq Farman of Fair Isle

qualifier: [wrote to the Citadel about Franklyn's treatment of Princess Rhaena; observed the incident firsthand]
evidence_snippet: Smike wrote to the Citadel after Lord Franklyn brusquely commanded his late father's guest, Princess Rhaena Targaryen, to depart Fair Isle.
